slotTaken: The selected time slot is already booked. Please choose another time.

dateTimeSelect.selectDatePrompt: Please select a date from the calendar

patientForm.name: Full Name *
patientForm.sensitiveDataAgree: I agree to the above and will enter my health information
patientForm.sensitiveDataBody: Health information entered in the "Symptoms / Concerns" field may constitute sensitive personal information under Japan's Act on the Protection of Personal Information. It will be used solely for appointment coordination and treatment preparation, and will never be disclosed to third parties without your consent.
patientForm.sensitiveDataError: Please consent to the handling of your health information
patientForm.symptomsPlaceholder: e.g. lower back pain, stiff shoulders since early this month
patientForm.reminderEmail: Receive a reminder email the day before your appointment
patientForm.reminderEmailDesc: A reminder will be sent to your email address the day before your appointment. You can unsubscribe at any time.
patientForm.privacyPolicyError: Please agree to the Privacy Policy
patientForm.validationFuriganaFormat: Please enter the reading in hiragana (e.g. やまだ たろう) or katakana (e.g. ヤマダ タロウ)
patientForm.validationBirthdateRequired: Please enter your date of birth
patientForm.validationEmailRequiredForMail: Email address is required when contact method is "Email"
patientForm.validationSensitiveConsent: Please consent to the handling of your health information
patientForm.visitHistoryNotice: The information you enter will be retained as part of your visit history. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for details on the retention period and how your data is handled.

complete.checklist1: We will contact you after confirming your booking.
complete.checklist2: To cancel or change your appointment, please note your reservation number and use the button below or call us.
complete.checklist3: If you have health insurance, please bring your insurance card on the day.
complete.questionnaireDesc: Filling out the questionnaire before your visit allows us to start your treatment smoothly.

cancel.alreadyCancelled: This booking has already been cancelled.
cancel.pastCutoff: The cancellation deadline ({{minutes}} minutes before) has passed. Online cancellation is no longer available.
cancel.reasonHint: Providing a reason is optional. You may cancel without stating a reason.
cancel.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking? This action cannot be undone.
cancel.doneMessage: If you have any questions, please contact us by phone.
cancel.validationRequired: Please enter your reservation number and phone number

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.notSet: No privacy policy has been set.

timeSlots.closedDay: No appointments available on this day

adminProxy.bannerDesc: Entering patient information from a phone reservation. Please confirm consent verbally over the phone.
